steps.title: Use the cofunction identity
steps.content:
Since
$$\frac{\sin X}{\cos Y}=1$$
it follows that
$$\sin X=\cos Y$$
For acute angles, sine of one angle equals cosine of its complement.

steps.title: Relate the acute angles
steps.content: Because both angles are acute, $\sin X=\cos Y$ means $X$ and $Y$ are complementary. Therefore their measures add to $90^\circ$.
